description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-Win that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow also allows for manual dispatch from the Actions tab. Use a matrix job on windows-latest to build the project in two configurations: Win64 and Win32. For each configuration, check out the repository, initialize submodules, install Qt, create a build directory, configure and build the project using qmake and nmake, package the project, and upload the artifacts.
